
---
title: "Week 2"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: harvard-cite-them-right.csl
---
# Week 2 {.unnumbered}

Here is the presentation on LandSat sensor  and its historic evolution and its application in the real world. 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
xaringanExtra::embed_xaringan(
  url = "https://github.com/FiazHussain27/Casa0023-Xaringa.git/Week-2.html",
  ratio = "16:9"
)
```
